Title: Suspicious email campaign targeting finance team
Description: Multiple finance team members received phishing emails impersonating the CFO requesting wire transfers
RootCause: External threat actor using spoofed domain
CorrectiveAction: Email filtering rules updated and awareness alert sent

Title: Failed brute-force attempts on VPN gateway
Description: Automated brute-force login attempts detected from IP range 185.x.x.x targeting VPN
RootCause: Credential stuffing attack using leaked passwords
CorrectiveAction: IP range blocked and MFA enforcement verified

Title: Employee emailed spreadsheet to personal account
Description: Employee forwarded client contact list to personal Gmail for remote work
RootCause: Lack of awareness about data handling procedures
CorrectiveAction: Refresher training provided and DLP rule strengthened

Title: SharePoint Online outage affecting all users
Description: Microsoft 365 service degradation impacting SharePoint and Teams for 4 hours

Title: Malware detected on developer workstation
Description: Trojan detected by EDR on developer laptop after downloading open-source package
RootCause: Compromised npm package in dependency chain
CorrectiveAction: Package removed and software composition analysis tool deployed

Title: Tailgating incident at Sydney office
Description: Visitor followed employee through secure door without badge scan
RootCause: Employee held door open for unknown person
CorrectiveAction: Tailgating awareness signage installed and reminder email sent

Title: Unapproved SaaS application detected
Description: Marketing team using unapproved file-sharing service for client deliverables
CorrectiveAction: Discovery scan identified 3 instances — migration to approved tool underway

Title: Third-party vendor data exposure
Description: Vendor (VND-009) reported potential exposure of delivery address data
CorrectiveAction: Vendor conducting forensic investigation — affected data scope being determined
